---
title: "What I'm Doing Now"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: ../talks/talks.css
---

_As of January 31, 2026_

I'm spending my time mostly on:

- 👨‍💼 Working full time as an economist at [GSMA Intelligence](https://www.gsmaintelligence.com/meet-the-team/harry-aquije-ballon), where I study how digital technologies are transforming the society, and its implications on policy, competition and regulation.
- 🌍 Living in London.  
- 🏃Training for the Milano Marathon in April 2026.  
- 🕺 Dancing salsa every week.  
- ✍️ Creating new content for this site around economics, geospatial analysis, machine learning, and gen AI.  
- 📚 Current reading list:
  - 📖 _War and Peace_
  - 🤖 _Generative AI with LangChain_
  - 🚀 _Space Race 2.0_
